body:
Tunesia's latest 3 games:

Belgium: 5-1 loss (friendly)

Sweden: 5-1 loss

Japan: 4-0 loss

I'm sure they are looking forward to the Netherlands.

Even without key players like Endo, Minamino, Kubo, and Mitoma, we're still competing well. The level of Japanese football keeps improving year by year.

Send as many players as possible to Europe and let them develop there!!!

This Japan team is so likeable! Really good to watch, brilliant attitude, brilliant fans and brilliant results. Of all the teams in the tournament they feel like the one that looks like a club side the most, their patterns of play are so good! Hope they go far!

I don't want to overreact since our knockout path is very difficult...but I think we can beat almost anyone. I have hope we can make a semifinal maybe. The team is playing with amazing fighting spirit.
Very impressed by Japan, playing like this and they have Mitoma and Endo injured.

On one hand, disappointed by Tunisia.

On the other hand, happy that my boy from Feyenoord Ueada scored twice in this milestone 1000th game of the world cup.
No mitoma no minamino no endo and no Kubo and Japan still won 4-0

Tunisia are nearly always awful at the World Cup yet always qualify with ease. 

They have barely had any good moments, no quality players they just qualify and exist. 

No team has made more World Cup's and done less.
I'm so fucking glad I slept instead of staying up to watch this bullshit

Honestly, if you are Tunisia, what do you even do to fix the national team? Feels like they are in an impossible situation. The last generation, who were at least competent, is gone, the new generation is showing nothing and I can't really think of any big prospects. The Federation also looks like a total mess.
Japan just play so beautifully. The entire play leading up to that header was class.

Nah, their defense is the horrible part and from what I see in two game Japan can dominate the pacing and catch defenders off-guard. I anticipate a goal difference battle between Japan and the Netherlands instead of Japan and Sweden fighting for 3rd.
Japan cooked them on offense and defense. Their passing was beautiful

It is just really funny how the previous coach of Tunesia just decided to play a completely new system at the World Cup. 

Then comes in Renard, who *also* changes up the system. They had three days of practice with Renard! This was a disaster waiting to happen
Japan are just so fun to watch, easily one of the most technically gifted sides in this tournament.

Hopefully I'm not tripping but Japan actually looks stronger than Brazil to me. France and Argentina still stronger but Japan looking mighty strong. Their teamplay is so efficient. No star ego player to look after, nope, just good passing and whoever gets to strike does a good strike. There's no one Ronaldo-like player they feel like they HAVE to pass to, they're just free to pass to the best positioned striker.
Japan’s chant is very catchy and I respect the fact I can’t recall a moment of the game where they weren’t singing

Regardless of Japan’s results this World Cup. I prefer Hajime Moriyasu to stay as their manager heading to the 2030 World Cup. He has already established the system needed to go head to head with giants.
Good thing they kicked their coach! Looks like it made a huge positive difference 😂
No. Sweden attack is good, but their defense is really bad. They will get cooked by good teams, just like the game with Netherlands.
Not forgetting Minamino and Kubo injured too
I could watch Japan play all day
Tunisia has to be the stinkiest national team i've ever seen at a world cup
Time for a new manager Tunisia 🤓

i've really been enjoying the heart of the japanese team.  
the player falling in the surface was actually fouled, not a dive. i feel like  i've never seen a japanese soccer player dive for a foul, at this point if i was a referee i'd give them the benefit of the doubt.

but even after getting denied a penalty they actually earned, they didnt throw a tantrum like many teams would have and kept their head in the game. mad respect.

from now on, japan is the team of my heart. they still are underdog, but damn i want them to win.
Tunisia getting the results I expected from Haiti.

Today I feel Japanese

But for now, good night all
Herve Renard deserves better. Tunisia is terrible
They play a style that easily beats other African teams, and gets them into the World Cup. However, their tactics and squad are useless against the rest of the world.
Japan is simply on another level, brilliant to watch, great chemistry ... We may have only seen two matches from them, but i am sure they will advance far

Well, we've seen teams who disappointed and couldn't force their luck like Turkey......but Tunisia? That was painful to watch. The Tunisian players obviously had things to do and places to be but playing at a World Cup wasn't on that list so they got what they wanted. They can go home early and enjoy their vacation.
Japan played like how FIFA pros play

Is it really? I thought Korea gets Group B second place (so probably Canada) if it finishes second. Japan gets either Brazil or Morocco if they're first or second and France or Germany if they get third I think.
Trash ass performance from Tunisia
Renard out
If I'm Herve Renard I'm resigning immediately. Your players gave absolutely fuck all with that shithousery of a performance, embarrassing
Feel like Tunisia was here every year in recent memory but never perform, just lucky qualifier draws?
Tunisia better give up their ticket to Nigeria or Cameroon. They are fkn asssss. Worst team out of 48 nations
Bro took the job for a quick summer vacation and pay, not bad for a mercenary.
Tbf i feel bad for Herve renard. He took this job in the middle of this tournament which is hard. Renard deserves respect to take this difficult job

The entire federation should resign and be replaced by actual competent people. The extremely corrupt FA we have is the root of all our problems in football. But all Tunisians know that this will never happen and that we're stuck with those guys for a while
Beat the refs and a hard-fighting Tunisia side with the most goals we’ve ever scored in a World Cup game. Big things coming for Japan
lmao, he brought this on himself.
Huge victory by Japan. I thought Tunisia would play a cagey game but they couldn't succeed even at that
I think most of the world would be pretty happy if Japan won a world cup. They're very likable, play exciting football and of course are an incredibly correct and respectful bunch. Pure class.
i dont think sweden is going to "wreck" jpn
So deserving of the 1000th WC game!
Will sweden cause an upset in R32, yes the netherlands cooked them but their attack with elanga, isak and gyo is one of the best of the tournament.
I just watched and enjoyed some HALAL ball. 🙏

The rd of 32 will be daunting for you guys...its either Brazil or Morocco.. But in all honesty you shouldn't be too sad if Sweden manages to wreck shit and demote you guys to 3rd. The pool of teams you would potentially face for 3rd includes Canada, Swiss, Mexico, US, Germany, France or Norway

Unfortunately, Kubo is the only one with a chance of returning.

Even if he's back, I doubt he can go 90 minutes.
“Performatively”

No, I clean at home too.
Don't just make stuff up.
I can't believe there are actually people who get influenced by AI-generated images like that.

Because the only people making a big deal out of this are random folks like you who have nothing to do with Japan. 

Besides, it's not like only men are cleaning up the stadiums. You guys are making a huge fuss over something incredibly stupid.
Iran of Africa.

Holy shit.. As it stands.. 🇰🇷 VS 🇯🇵 in the rd of 32..our boys would be significant underdogs to Japan but if anyone knows how to beat Japan.. It's us.. Lfg dream matchup

Edit: set myself up for disappointment by misreading the bracket.. But the matchup is still very much a possibility in the rd of 16
On the other hand, facing Netherlands or Japan as winner of group C is also very unlucky for a group winner. Kinda BS that 1C plays 2F and 1F plays 2C while other first seeds play third seeds
South Korea is most likely to finish as 2A and play 2B which is Canada or Switzerland. Dont think South Korea vs Japan is possible
Do you mean the Kappa brand logo?
Fantastic game by Japan. Looking forward to the game against Sweden
Pretty much this, they were the first african side to ever win a game at the world cup and they have never improved since then. 7 qualifications to the world cup and only 2 wins
Absolutely loved the Japan performance. They let off the gas the last ten, I wish they would have kept pushing. They will need every goal possible to beat out Netherlands for the group
Tunisia’s World Cup can be summed up by one of their players chugging to get back on a Japanese counter, down 4-0 in stoppage time, just to get easily bodied

so losses in your first 2 group games means automatic elimination right? i can’t think of a scenario where winning the third game can at least save you a third place finishers because of the H2H tiebreaker right?
I am just imagining if Nigeria was here instead of Tunis. Life would’ve been great
Tunisia applied the same logic like Italy today, basically good enough to qualify and become shit in the main tournament.
Lol feel bad for what? He took the job knowing it was a shitshow and he’s getting a pay day

There’s no manager can save Tunisia, respect Renard. I pretty sure he knew what’s getting in.

I guess getting the bag is gig at the moment.
I'm fucking spent. See y'all at lunch. Good night.
Side note, such a nostalgia for me, I remember watching these 2 teams in Japan 24 years ago with Japan winning 2-0 and Nakata scoring his only WC goal.

Even on Girls Channel, a Japanese message board that's popular among women, people are basically ignoring it.

Like I've said repeatedly, the only people getting upset about this are people like you who have nothing to do with Japan.
Damn, group F is so unlucky. Facing Brazil or Morocco is brutal immediately in the first stage of knockout... I hope Japan and NED can both go trough
Given this game, I have concluded that Sweden will lose the next game game -1-0 to Japan.
Tunisia is the king of qualifers , not perform so much in the WC group stage
Kappa brand shirts.
A 5-3-2 with a defensive midfielder, well deserved
They did just win against Brazil 3-2 w both teams missing key players
3 goals in 2 games isn’t bad compared to 9
Correct, we are past the era where we could hold up against a good offence. In order to win against top teams today we will need to score 4 goals minimum.
Made good job. Sano always appeared when Japan lost the ball. He is the heart of the team.
Have you ever been to Japan? Oh but you’ve read articles about it, so that’s all you need to know.
Hard to imagine 3 pts and -6 or -7 gd is going to get it done regardless
In rock, paper, scissors fashion, rising sun beats crescent moon.
Breaking News: Hervé Renard resigns as Tunisia manager

They have always had the attitude and fans. Now that their hundred years football plan is finally bearing fruit, their technique is catching up as well! So hopefully brilliant result will follow from hereon.
Are you speaking about Tunisia or Sweden?

You have no idea how frustrating it is to be a Tunisian fan.
I fucking hate our national team, we always sucked but never like this, this is the worst showing ever.

Our federation is corrupt, they select players from natinal clubs so clubd get money from Fifa not because they are good. Some players pay to get selected.

I hope we lose by 10-0 against Netherlands so they put those fuckers in prison.

Group F being tied to group C is fucked up.. Brszil or Morocco is not who you want to see... Funnily enough the Economist who picked the last 3 champs had Japan winning the rd of 32 matchup with Brazil..so still possible lol
Group H and Group J being tied together is also cursed because if either of Spain or Argentina lose the top seed they face off first round
Tunisia should have just kept the original manager. 😂
The M on Tunisia's shoulder looks like two naked girls sitting back to back
The TSN guys doing the post-game right now look absolutely exhausted lol
This was a beautiful match.
That’s what infuriates me. Teams like Nigeria and Cameroon would perform much better
Could argue Japan beats Morocco. They have not been impressive
Thats why Japan team are collecting them.
No. 2 teams can lose the first two games, then it comes down to the final game. You can qualify for the best 3rd with 3 points.
Sad to hear as tunisian i will be shearing with all my heart for morocco
Tunisia had the easiest fkn route to the tournament. They are always assss every WC
With the Netherlands playing Tunisia, I don't like Japan's chances of topping the group.
Idk there is Turkey
Turkey produced chances at least, meanwhile Tunisia....
It is true but Turkey lost against a 10 man Paraguay so that has to be noted.

the last coach picked a good route at an unfortunate timing, he saw the writing on the wall, and decided to purge everyone for the young generation, good strategy if you have time to prepare, very bad when you're few months away from the greatest tournament ever! not only he traumatized the kids, hurt the rep of the club, hurt their budget, etc his strategy didn't work, backfired, as a Tunisian, this is heartbreaking!
goal difference is equal now while the netherlands still play tunesia so if they fuck this up - and dont end first which guarantuees a R32 exit - its totally on them.
It's between playing Brazil or Morocco in R32 so not a world of difference though
heslike that every game. he is an industrial vaccum cleaner

Why are you getting so worked up about this when you have nothing to do with Japan? you there something wrong with you?


It's true that men in Japan tend to spend less time on housework. However, they also tend to work longer hours.
So when you add together paid working hours and time spent doing housework, the difference between men and women becomes very small.

Of course, there are probably some men who don't do housework even though both partners work full-time. But those people would be considered pretty old-fashioned, and in today's society they would almost certainly be criticized for it.
We did have an extremely easy draw this time, but for the previous World Cups, CAF qualifiers were brutal so we "deserved" our qualifications
Didnt they win 9 and draw one

Brazil's last two encounters with the Netherlands ended with Dutch wins. It's amusing to say NL/JPN are unlucky when that's the only really relevant recent h2h. Brazil isn't the Brazil of the '90s/early '00s anymore, and while Morocco is strong, there's still some questions about where they stand exactly at this point. They did struggle quite a bit with Scotland.
What if its Group C that's unlucky...
Korea can't finish first because H2H is the first tiebreaker. If Korea gets at least a point from RSA, 2nd is guaranteed, which leads to playing 2nd in Group B. The perks of being in a host's group.
No Japan would have to beat either of those two.. Korea will likely see Canada or the Swiss which is a great draw but yeah the chances of a Korea v Japan matchup are slim.. Slim but still possible

If the Netherlands had lost to Japan in the first match then Tunesia would still be in it. But with the NL of 4 points they can’t overtake the Dutch by winning the game. So they are out of the tournament.
Think of all the white dress shirts he’ll be able to buy with this paycheck
They got eliminated for a reason, if they were good enough they would’ve qualified
They are being injured a lot also 😞
Player-wise and historically, I do think Brazil are stronger. They are led by a world-class manager also. I am still rooting for Japan but this matchup is going to be tough...
It’s a shame that a lot of their key players are out injured. I think they’ll make the qf at most.
But then again all the goals we saw today were beautiful. They clearly have good players still.
Yeah exactly lol. Plus averaging like 75% possession with over 60 shots in 2 matches, they just can't finish to save their life

Well after this game, your coach could change tactics and switch to a more defensive formation against good teams, that could stop the bleeding. But I'm not sure the team is familiar with playing in such a formation/counter, such as 5-3-2/5-4-1.
Sorry I don't follow japan, are those players in contention to be back for knockouts or are they out for good? I'm presuming they are great players who will make japan even more threatening

Japan has next to no public bins but the public spaces remain tidy because people take their rubbish home.  It’s the culture, regardless of how tidy an individual home is.  I can’t imagine why that tilts you so much.

It's funny, because the first time I saw this "Japan fans clean up after match" wasn't in football, but in rugby.

I think it was at the 2015 RWC, and Japanese fans were filmed cleaning up venues after their team had played.

There was none of this "oh, they're only doing it for performative reasons" because a nice, respectable act is nice and respectable.

Only in the cynicism of 2026 as something obviously kind and respectful been turned into some sinister propaganda plot.
Dominated their group almost completely with just one draw to spoil the run.
with our OGs until the fraud coach came and purged everyone for kids

On the other hand, I don't think either of Brazil or Morrocco would want to face Japan and Netherlands this soon. I think Japan could still pick up the third and advance, losing by 1 against Sweden should be enough.
Argentina is finishing top... Spain will probably manage to as well since Uruguay fucked up and drew with Saudi Arabia

There have to be some first seeds that play some second seeds unfortunately. So you either do a fixed bracket, or you can do a seeded bracket (see the 2025 U-17 World Cup) but that requires some delay before R32, to ensure teams have enough rest. The U-17 World Cup had several matches being played simultaneously so rest was less of an issue
Oh yeah, but then you gotta beat Brazil or Morocco for that to happen which is an even bigger underdog than Japan
Ah I see. Basically if you lose your first 2 games you better pray the third team you play also started their first game with a loss
Yeah as a dutchie I had a hard time not being happy for them with the 2-2
Nice bait.
Kappa is 90s iconic
Nice beating Japan
But the midfielder has a High/High work rate and the wingbacks are set to Always Overlap.

They don't easily beat other African teams, they win by the narrowest of margins and shithousing regardless of the opponent. You can see how this is backfiring more and more in the last AFCON when they couldn't beat Tanzania and lost to Mali in the R16 despite Mali getting a red card around 30 minutes into the game. In the 2023 AFCON they failed to pass the group stage after losing to Namibia and drawing with Mali and South Africa.

The team is utter shit and has no business being in the WC, it is only fair that they get banished into oblivion and don't qualify for anything anymore, the levels of corruption are off the charts.
eh. Brazil played for a draw with morroco and never had reason to go full tilt vs Haiti. I think people are being reactionary. They'll be fine.
They can beat both..Japan just beat Brazil 3-2 a few months ago.. First team ever to come back from a 0-2 deficit vs Brazil and win
neither has brazil tbh
i think jpn will win against sweden and get second place due to goal diff with ned topping the grp
i dont think sweden is going to "wreck" jpn

Well you couldn't beat us, so... ;)

Seriously though, I don't think any team fancies facing you now.
They have to go far to get to Cancun

i would argue brazil is a better opponent than morocco..

but its indeed not the same difference as the teams ivory coast and germany are playing
Breaking news: Japan is deeply imperfect like every other nation on earth.
Blue Lock is coming home!!!!

Plus Japan became the first team ever to beat Brazil from 0-2 goal deficit just a few months ago...so I don't think anyone thinks Japan has no chance but it still goes without saying that Brazil or Morocco are not the kind of teams you wanna see in your first knockout game
eh idk. i think both brazil and morocco are fine playing japan. netherlands is tougher for sure but japan is not some team to be afraid of for a truly world class team.
I was wrong... It's possible in the rd of 16 tho

~~I looked and its possible if South Korea finishes first in their group which I think is possible in a specific scenario where Czechia beats Mexico, South Korea beats South Africa and South Korea wins the three way tie by GD, and Japan would need to lose against Sweden and then somehow 1A needs to align with 3F. Very unlikely though~~

Not possible
Oh yeah i forgot czechia drew to south africa, it thought they beat, would have been possible via three way tie if czechia won
It's actually possible if Japan wins the group and both advance to the rd of 16..youre right I was mistaken but it is very much a possibility in the rd of 16
Nvm. You arleady knew all that your comment just confused me and I lost track of who you were

but if a team loses their first 2 games than that means there’s two teams above them with 3 points. The most they can get by the end of the third game is also 3 points, but since they lost to the other two teams above, they finish lower due to H2H?
Yes but it’s still the top 8 3rd place finishes go through
Not necessarily, if Curaçao lost they wouldn’t have been eliminated
It’s kappa logo , quite shit
Don’t start Sebastian Tounekti at striker and this would never have happened
The way how Tunisian FF function clearly helps explaining why Tunisia is so subpar. It changes coaches constantly like if managers are expandables.
Brother italy aren’t even good enough to qualify
Tunisia would have been the same had the African opponents improved. Throw Tunisia to the same band with Nigeria or Cameroon and both would smack them. Hell even South Africa was better than this.

NL, who bitchslapped Sweden 5-1, is worse than a Morocco that needed to play Pitch Roll Simulator 2026 to eek out a win against Scotland.

Mkay.
im the one who decides rankings you know. by that logic i guess cabo verde is just as good as spain since they drew them.
NL worse than Morocco hmmmm

When I saw Brazil Haiti it seemed like Brazil were having a hard time (despite the 3-0 scoreline). Japan made this win look super effortless. Yeah its probably reactionary but this will be a fun match to watch for sure
Also Japan is missing 4 extremely strong players
Omae wo mo shindeiru
Better than being sacked
But wouldn't that come with severance pay?

They don't even have to wreck Japan... They just have to beat em and Japan get knocked down to 3rd place which is honestly probably a better draw for them in the KO rds.. I would field the B team if I were Moriyasu
Lefties now openly embracing trash and messed up spaces as progressive. It's consistent with multiculturalism though.

Are you stupid? I made one reddit comment and that's getting "worked up"? Have you considered the fact that maybe it is you that is getting "worked up"? Have I shattered your fragile "Japanese Pride" that has been plastered all over your trash bags? If you knew about the housework issue why did you dismiss it as AI-generated? Why do you not address the public trash problem after festivals and events? Why do you not address the ultra far-right sponsorship of the cleaning event? Very convenient for you, isn't it, to pick and choose what to deflect as AI-generated. What a joke of a country.

yeah ur tripping. brazil is the only country who played a world class team in morocco, japan played netherlands whos worse than morocco, tunisia which is basically a joke even worse than haiti right now probably. cant compare the two.
Just own up to it then? Isn't your country infamous for deflection and revisionism? I mean you accused legitimate criticism as AI-generated. Is that how your people's brain work?

Yes, it's a hot topic and societal issue in Japan how the Japanese don't clean up in their own homes and public festivals but somehow impeccably clean up when all eyes are on them. But the Weebs will go: "Mah Japan!!!"

Oh, so you clean up at home so it must be true? There are literally several articles on this problem but they must all be AI-generated? It's easy to deflect criticism of Japan as AI-generated, isn't it? lol fucking idiot.

Waiting for the Japanese fans to performatively clean up trash after the game, sponsored by the ultra-far right APA hotel
chain with the trash bags labeled “JAPAN PRIDE”. Stay classy Japan.
